reasoning_model_1: The model failed on Content Accuracy. The generated audio includes an unrequested phrase '再好' (Zai hao) at the very beginning, resulting in '再好，这个方案好，我们通过了。'. This addition violates the strict script requirement. Regarding the paralinguistic feature, while there is a pause after the word '好' in the phrase '这个方案好', the initial hallucination and the structural phrasing make the output unnatural and inconsistent with the specific command to read only the target sentence.
reasoning_model_2: The model performs excellent on Content Accuracy, reading the text '这个方案，好，我们通过了。' exactly as requested without additions or omissions. Regarding Paralinguistic Compliance, the audio effectively implements the instruction to 'pause noticeably after the word 好'. The prosody isolates '好' (Good/Okay) as a distinct affirmation before continuing with '我们通过了', which aligns perfectly with the command. The flow is natural and the specific pause requirement is met.
model_comparison: Model 2 is the clear winner. Model 1 failed the primary criterion of Content Accuracy by hallucinating extra words ('再好') at the start of the sentence, which is a major flaw. Model 2 followed the script perfectly and successfully executed the specific paralinguistic instruction to pause after '好', creating a natural and accurate rendition of the command.
